entry.title: Print customer specific inspection plan results on Outbound Certificate of Analysis in SAP QM
entry.content:

When is Outbound Certificate of Analysis usually generated at time of Outbound Delivery creation, at what step?

Also, wanted to check if its possible at before the Outbound Certificate of Analysis is generated, the system should check-

  1. If any customer specific inspection plan exists
  2. See all the inspection characteristics in the customer specific inspection plan & only those MICs that are present in customer specific inspection plan & not all the characteristics in the main inspection plan (since customer specific inspection plans could have different number of MICs)

Thanks,

RD

entry.title: Hey Lingen Community!
entry.content:
I am thrilled to be part of this community and excited to introduce myself to you! As the curators of this group, we would like to share a bit about who I am, what you can expect from us, and what drives me to host amazing events for you.


About Me : I am Marco Ich bin SAP Consultant, Developer and Trainer I am a passionate SAP Consultant and developer at NTT Data, at the same time I organize sap codejams in Lingen and would like to build and expand an SAP Community in Lingen.

What to Expect: I am going to organize local events and keep you posted on them in this location group. Also, I am always open to new ideas and feedback to make our local community even better!

Let's connect: I'd love to get to know you better and hear your thoughts on what makes a great event. Feel free to reach out here on the community platform or connect with me on Linkedin https://www.linkedin.com/in/marcobuescher/.


See you soon!

Hallo Lingen Community!

Ich bin begeistert, Teil dieser Gemeinschaft zu sein und freue mich, mich euch vorzustellen! Als Kurator dieser Gruppe möchte ich euch ein wenig darüber erzählen, wer ich bin, was ihr von uns erwarten könnt und was mich antreibt, tolle Veranstaltungen für euch zu organisieren.


Über mich: Ich bin Marco Ich bin SAP-Berater, -Entwickler und -Trainer. Ich bin ein leidenschaftlicher SAP-Berater und -Entwickler, gleichzeitig organisiere ich SAP Codejams in Lingen und möchte eine SAP Community in Lingen aufbauen und erweitern.


Was Sie erwartet: Ich werde lokale Events organisieren und euch in dieser Location-Gruppe auf dem Laufenden halten. Außerdem bin ich immer offen für neue Ideen und Feedback, um unsere lokale Community noch besser zu machen!


Lassen Sie uns Kontakt aufnehmen: Ich würde Sie gerne besser kennenlernen und Ihre Meinung dazu hören, was eine gute Veranstaltung ausmacht. Melden Sie sich einfach hier auf der Community-Plattform oder kontaktieren Sie mich auf Linkedin https://www.linkedin.com/in/marcobuescher/.

 


Auf Wiedersehen!

entry.title: DELIVERY SCHEDULE TARGET QUANTITY AND DIRECTORY OF SUPPLY SOURCES
entry.content: DELIVERY SCHEDULE TARGET QUANTITY AND DIRECTORY OF SUPPLY SOURCES Objective : On certain contracts, our supplies are linked to contractual quantities which extend over several years. The system should help us generate purchase requisitions and not delivery times when all target quantities are achieved as per delivery schedules. But that is not the case today. Here is an example in test base Item: 143000340 Supplier: x Open order: 440133 Extension: 2710 Test #1 DIRECTORY OF SUPPLY SOURCES modified at the end of 2024 Target quantity adjusted to the end of 2024 with delivered history + upcoming delivery until the end of 2024  Target quantity in open order: 1792 CT We launch the Net Need Calculation via MD41 and it works: the system generates a Purchase Request after 2024. But it is the DIRECTORY OF SUPPLY SOURCES that does the work and not the targeted quantities. See below. Test #2 The SOURCE DIRECTORY provisioning was changed immediately to see how the system reacts. We do not change the target quantity. Here, the system generates delivery times in 2025 and does not take into account the target quantity. Test #3 We go back to where we started and do the opposite. We are setting the end of validity of the SOURCE DIRECTORY offer at 2024 and we are not setting any quantitative objective. The net requirement calculation works and the system generates the purchase request. Conclusion: it is the SOURCE DIRECTORY of supply which controls and we would like to be able to control by the target quantity as well, please inform me of the customization to be made

entry.title: Rebate Accruals validity period issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have an issue related to Sales Rebates in S4 HANA Condition Contract Management.

I have created a condition contract with Validity 01.01.2024 to 31.12.2024.

in the settlement calendar the specific calendar related to client calendar.

Delta accruals : 31.01.2024 

Delta accruals : 29.02.2024 

Delta accruals : 31.03.2024 

Delta accruals : 30.04.2024  and so on till December.

in the condition maintenance, I have chosen material specific combination and maintained the records as below for REA1 - Rebate accruals.

Example:

material X     Percentage         5          01.01.2024      29.02.2024   

material Y     Percentage         5          01.01.2024      29.02.2024   

material X     Percentage         7          01.03.2024      31.12.2024   

material X     Percentage         7          01.03.2024      31.12.2024   

When I posted the sales transactions, business volume updated accordingly. While posting the delta accruals using WB2R_SC t code for the month of Jan and Feb, system has considered 5% as per the maintenance. but when I post the accruals for March month system is considering for the 7 % for total business volume. (in this case the previous months 5% accruals postings were reversed in RED2 - Rebate accruals reversal condition and for total business volume till date 31 march 2024 system calculated 7%)   

client requirement is, the accruals to be considered as 5% for the month of Jan and Feb months and 7% for the month of March. 

Please let me know is this the standard behavior? if this can be done, could someone guide me how to achieve this by config. 

my understanding: Business volume is considered as a single value with contract validity but not as per the delta accruals condition. if this is the right understanding, kindly let me know what the purpose for Validity period for REA1 condition.

 Appreciate the help.

Regards,

Adithya.

entry.title: Re: Compare 2 payloads to identify changes using Groovy Script in SAP CI
entry.content:
Hi Madhu,

I think that you are missing some break logic in your cycles in the first script. Let's imagine the match is found in the first inner cycle iteration. It should write true and go to the next item from the outer cycle. But although it really writes true, it then continues running in the inner cycle and overwrites the true value with false, if there are further items which don't match. So your results will be corrupted.

I think it should look like (simplified for local testing):

for(int i=0;i<payload1.Category.size();i++) {
        payload1Node = payload1.Category[i].CategoryCode.text();
        for (int j = 0; j < payload2.row.size(); j++) {
            payload2Node = payload2.row[j].WHCode.text();
            nodeMatching = false
            if (payload1Node == payload2Node) {
                nodeMatching = "true";
                println "$payload1Node is found"
                break
            }
        }
        if (nodeMatching == false) {
                println "$payload1Node is missing"
            }
    }
}
